features.name: unpacked struct with nested struct definition
features.description: Code should include an unpacked struct definition with a nested struct inside it, containing multiple logic fields
features.snippet: typedef struct { struct { logic m0; logic [3:0] m1; logic m2; } sub; } struct_t;

features.name: unpacked struct inequality comparison
features.description: Code should include an inequality comparison between two unpacked struct variables using the != operator

features.name: logic vector field in unpacked struct
features.description: Code should include an unpacked struct with a logic vector field (e.g., logic [3:0])
features.snippet:
typedef struct { logic [3:0] m1; } my_struct_t;
my_struct_t s;
